content.title: Outdoor Lighting
content.subtitle: Illuminate Your Space with Maxima Concrete

content.title: Transform Your Backyard into a Nighttime Oasis
content.description: Turn your Central Ohio backyard into a captivating, functional retreat after sunset with low-voltage decorative lighting from Maxima Concrete. Our lighting systems are designed to illuminate, accentuate, and protect your outdoor living spaces — from patios and pools to paver walls, driveways, and garden paths. Whether you want ambient lighting for relaxing evenings or vibrant accents for entertaining, we'll craft the perfect illumination plan for your home.

content.title: Why Choose Low-Voltage Lighting?

items.text: Concrete is remarkably strong, resisting time, weather, and wear — a long-term investment for your property.
items.label: High-Strength Mix (6.5-Bag Concrete):

benefits.title: Safety & Security
benefits.description: Soft yet bright illumination improves nighttime visibility, preventing slips and deterring unwanted visitors

items.text: No rot, no fading, no hassle. A simple clean and occasional seal keep your patio looking brand new.
items.label: Crack Resistance:

benefits.title: Aesthetics & Ambiance
benefits.description: Strategically placed fixtures highlight textures, colors, and architectural details — creating warmth and depth throughout your landscape.

items.text: Choose from multiple textures, colors, and finishes to fit your outdoor design perfectly.
items.label: Style:

benefits.title: Energy Efficiency
benefits.description: Low-voltage lighting consumes up to 80% less energy than traditional systems, delivering eco-friendly beauty and cost savings.

items.text: A well-crafted patio enhances both your home’s appeal and resale value.

benefits.title: Versatility & Simple Installation
benefits.description: Available in countless fixtures, styles, and beam spreads, low-voltage lights are easily installed and expanded — ideal for both homeowners and contractors.

content.bottomText: Low-voltage lighting consumes up to 80% less energy than traditional systems, delivering eco-friendly beauty and cost savings.

content.title: Maxima Concrete’s Lighting Solutions

styles.title: Path Lights:
styles.description: Subtle fixtures that safely guide guests along walkways and driveways.

styles.title: Step Lights:
styles.description: Increase visibility on stairs and transitions, adding both beauty and security.

styles.title: Paver Lights:
styles.description: Flush-mounted LEDs embedded in patios, steps, and driveways for a seamless glow.

styles.title: Spotlights:
styles.description: Highlight focal points such as sculptures, trees, or water features.

content.description: Every home is unique — that’s why Maxima offers a tailored selection of lighting solutions designed to fit your layout, materials, and aesthetic:

content.title: Smart Controls & Color Options
content.description:
Take lighting to the next level with timers and color-changing systems.

• Timers: Automate on/off schedules for security and convenience.

• Color-Changing LEDs: Shift hues for holidays, events, or mood lighting — adding personality and seasonal flair to your yard.

cards.title: Concrete:
cards.description: Sleek, continuous, and low-maintenance. Options include stamped, colored, or stained finishes to match your design vision.

cards.title: Pavers:
cards.description: Available in many colors, shapes, and patterns. Easy to repair and ideal for decorative or modular layouts.

content.title: Concrete vs. Pavers — Choosing the Right Base
content.bottomText: Whether you choose the timeless strength of concrete or the creative flexibility of pavers, Maxima ensures flawless integration with your lighting design.

items.question: What outdoor lighting options do you offer?
items.answer: We integrate path, step, wall, and accent lighting into patios, walkways, and outdoor living spaces for both beauty and safety.

items.question: Is outdoor lighting energy efficient?
items.answer: Yes. We use LED fixtures that deliver bright, warm light while keeping energy use low.

items.question: Can lighting be added to an existing patio or walkway?
items.answer: In many cases, yes. We'll assess your space and recommend the best way to add lighting.

items.question: Do you offer financing?
items.answer: Yes, we offer flexible payment options.
